## WidgetCreator type

Write all widgets required by the params to the output. Returns an interface that can draw the widgets to a specified area.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type WidgetCreator<Positioning, ParsedPosition = Parsed<Positioning>> = (parent: ParentControl<Positioning, ParsedPosition>, output: BuildOutput) => Layoutable<ParsedPosition>;
```
**References:** [Parsed](./openrct2-flexui.parsed.md)<!-- -->, [ParentControl](./openrct2-flexui.parentcontrol.md)<!-- -->, [BuildOutput](./openrct2-flexui.buildoutput.md)<!-- -->, [Layoutable](./openrct2-flexui.layoutable.md)
